overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a dark robe exploring a gothic fantasy temple complex. The character transitions from outdoor terraces with twisted columns and a large dead tree, through a dark candlelit interior hall, to an open courtyard with floating islands visible in the hazy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone terrace with twisted columns overlooking gardens

events.description: character begins ascending the stone stairs along the terrace wall

agents.ego_description: walking up the stone stairs alongside the gothic building, passing twisted columns

entered.detail: ornate spiraling stone column with intricate carvings
decorative stone balustrade along the terrace edge
massive gnarled tree with no leaves, visible against the sky
weathered stone tile pavement with patches of dried grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated outdoor terrace with twisted stone columns and decorative railings. A massive dead tree dominates the background against a hazy sky. The character begins ascending stone stairs built into the terrace wall, moving toward a large gothic structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic tower entrance with red tiled roof

events.description: camera pans up to reveal the tall gothic tower with red roof tiles
entering the dark doorway, transitioning from natural to dim interior light

agents.ego_description: approaching the tower entrance and stepping through the arched doorway into darkness

entered.detail: tall stone tower with arched windows and decorative stonework
large arched entrance with heavy stone lintel
sloped roof with red clay tiles on the tower structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive gothic tower with a red tiled roof. After a camera transition showing the tower's height, the character walks toward the arched entrance and steps inside, leaving the natural light for a dimly lit interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark candlelit hall with statues and columns

events.description: approaching the exit, natural light becomes visible at the end of the hall

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit interior hall past stone pillars and wall-mounted candles

entered.detail: massive cylindrical stone columns supporting the arched ceiling
wall-mounted candles providing warm flickering light
large stone statue visible on upper balcony level
recessed statues in wall niches lining the corridor

segments.scene_description: Inside the dark hall, the character walks between massive stone pillars illuminated only by wall-mounted candles. Recessed statues line the walls, and a large figure stands on an upper balcony. The character moves steadily toward a distant archway where natural light begins to appear.

events.description: exiting the dark interior back to the exterior environment
encountering a golden-robed figure descending the stairs ahead

agents.ego_description: walking down the exterior stone stairs following a golden-robed figure

notable_agents.action: golden-robed figure descending the stairs ahead of the player character

entered.detail: wide stone staircase descending from the tower entrance
classical stone statues on pedestals flanking the stairs
massive floating landmasses visible in the distant hazy sky

segments.scene_description: The character exits the dark hall onto an exterior stone staircase. A golden-robed figure is seen descending the stairs ahead. The environment opens up to reveal massive floating islands in the distant hazy sky, with classical statues flanking the stairway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with floating islands and gothic ruins

events.description: entering the open courtyard with full view of floating islands and distant ruins

agents.ego_description: walking across the stone courtyard toward the floating islands and ruins

entered.detail: wide open paved area with scattered debris and broken stones
crumbling gothic architecture and broken walls
massive stone base with a statue overlooking the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wide open stone courtyard surrounded by gothic ruins. Massive floating islands dominate the sky, appearing closer as the character advances. A large statue stands on a pedestal to the left, while broken terrain and distant towers fill the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from an elevated outdoor terrace through a dark gothic interior and out into a vast courtyard under a surreal sky. It begins with the character walking past twisted stone columns and a massive dead tree before ascending stairs toward a towering gothic structure with a red tiled roof. As the character steps through an arched entrance, the natural light vanishes, shifting the scene into a dimly lit hall where the camera moves between massive pillars illuminated by flickering wall candles. The environment then opens up as the character exits through a distant archway and descends an exterior staircase, where the darkness gives way to a hazy golden light. Finally, the camera advances across a wide stone courtyard surrounded by ruins, revealing massive floating islands that dominate the horizon.
